name: Dark Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy saucepan, combine the cream and brown sugar.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until the mixture comes to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Continue boiling and stirring until all the sugar has dissolved.
4. Remove from heat and gradually add the chopped chocolates, stirring until they are fully melted.
5. Whisk in the softened butter and Amaretto (or to taste).
6. Keep whisking until the sauce is smooth.
7. Allow it to cool slightly before serving.
Makes about 3 cups.
